mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_compute_log_type (type_name, type_code, type_desc, status, sort_order) VALUES (#{typeName}, #{typeCode}, #{typeDesc}, #{status}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_compute_log_type SET type_name=#{typeName}, type_code=#{typeCode}, type_desc=#{typeDesc}, status=#{status}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_compute_log_type SET is_del=1 WHERE id=#{id}
